title: verbascum erivanicum
intro: Verbascum erivanicum, also known as Armenian mullein, is a biennial plant belonging to the mullein genus, native to the Caucasus region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Verbascum erivanicum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations like infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
